title: Notification No.102/2012-Cus(NT), dated 16.11.2012
text: [To be published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (ii)] Government of India Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) Notification No. 102/2012-Customs (N.T.) New Delhi, the 16th November, 2012. S.O. (E). - In exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 5 of the Customs Act, 1962 (52 of 1962), the Central Board of Excise and Customs hereby imposes the Additional Commissioner or Joint Commissioner of Customs (Import), Custom House, Kandla, to exercise the powers and discharge the duties as adjudicating authority over the powers and duties exercisable by - (i) The Additional Commissioner or Joint Commissioner of Customs (Import),Custom House, Kandla, Gujarat (ii) The Additional Commissioner or Joint Commissioner of Customs (Import), Adani Port and Special Economic Zone (SEZ) Limited, Mundra, Guajart. for the purpose of adjudicating the matters relating to Show Cause Notice pertaining to M/s KLJ Organic Ltd., KLJ House, 63 Rama Marg, Najafgarh Road, New Delhi, issued vide, F.No. DRI/AZU/CI-04/KLJ Organic/2012 dated 06th August, 2012, by the Joint Director, Directorate of Revenue Intelligence, Zonal Unit, Ahmedabad. [F.No. 437/52/2012-Cus.IV] (M.V.Vasudevan) Under Secretary to the Government of India -- 1 of 1 --
